title: Windows Process from Unusual Path (Rare Value Analysis)
description: Identifies processes executing from non-standard paths commonly used by attackers (Temp, Public, AppData, Downloads). Legitimate software typically runs from Program Files or System32. Uses rare path analysis (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking + Field Analysis).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and (('Process Name' like '*Temp*') or ('Process Name' like '*Users*Public*') or ('Process Name' like '*AppData*Local*Temp*') or ('Process Name' like '*Downloads*') or ('Process Name' like '*ProgramData*')) | stats count as executions by 'Process Name', 'Host Name' | sort -executions
falsepositives: Temp files created by legitimate updaters
